svg.text: What deeper body models could unlock
Bones, or density — two paths past BlazePose.
Both research-licensed today. Commercial-clean path already priced in the viability matrix.

g.text: Option A — SKEL
Bones, not skin.
BlazePose (skin)
SKEL (bones)
True elbow flexion from bone — no pronation drift.
Addresses a known weakness of the 4/20 demo.
Femur vs tibia separable — Thomas test scoreable.
Hip IR/ER emerges as a real measurement, not a guess.
Scapula distinct from humerus — wall slide, Apley scratch.
GH vs ST joint contributions separated.
Score mobility the way a PT grades it.
Option B — Sapiens
308 landmarks + per-pixel body.
BlazePose
Sapiens
Grip width & wrist neutrality — 40 hand landmarks.
Deadlift, kettlebell swing — broken wrist flagged before low-back load.
Scapular tuck from 28-class segmentation.
Bench press setup visible; shoulder point wasn't enough.
Grimace & Valsalva — 243 face landmarks as fatigue signal.
Loaded carries, get-ups — strain before the form breaks.
Hands, face, and the body under clothing — seen.
Today
· BlazePose · 33 keypoints · commercial-clean · ships in the app
Frontier
· SKEL & Sapiens · research-licensed · slide only, not product
Gated on
· commercial dataset access — viability matrix
